description: Legal document mentioning the Nagid Yehuda b. Saʿadya. There are phrases about a man's legal competence (as in deathbed wills); quotes him as saying "my son Abū l-ʿAlāʾ with his mother so-and-so" (hence this is a draft); and "I found it/her missing the dinar." (Information in part from CUDL)
tags: head of the jews, parents, poverty
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
